task: Advanced high-economic-value task: AXI Boundary Burst Assertion Gap Closure. Produce an auditable analysis (axi_assertion_gap_report.md) and a counterexample_table.csv that: uses only the embedded packet; calculates all derived fields; classifies each record; ranks governing risks; recommends the smallest sufficient remediation action(s) that fit the embedded remediation_budget_usd; includes traceable calculations, formulas or executable logic, intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, explicit assumptions, validation checks, sensitivity notes, and a final decision table; marks unresolved ambiguity as needs_review; triggers expert review when any record changes classification after a 5% sensitivity shift. Do not invent inputs, substitute outside data, or hide uncertainty.
